## Definition of Ready

- [ ] Global DoR satisfied (`docs/v2_platform/templates/dor_checklist.md`)
- [ ] Story-specific DoR satisfied (see the epic phase doc)
- [ ] Dependencies resolved or mockable

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Global DoD satisfied (`docs/v2_platform/templates/dod_checklist.md`)
- [ ] Story-scoped tests green; docstrings + type hints complete
- [ ] Docs updated (subsystem doc + `docs/v2_platform/progress.md` + phase doc)
- [ ] Story branch merged into the epic branch and deleted
